title: lobelia roxburghiana
intro: Lobelia roxburghiana, also known as the Indian tobacco or Lobelia, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Lobelia roxburghiana include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Lobelia roxburghiana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
